catalog_row.ModelType: Estimated linearized medium-scale New Keynesian model with firm-specific capital, sticky wages, sticky prices, money demand, variable utilization, and investment adjustment costs
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: ACEL firm-specific capital; sticky wages; sticky prices; habit formation; money demand and transactions costs; neutral and embodied technology shocks; monetary policy money-growth rule; flexible-price comparison block

status_row.notes: Clean source-title match, but no normalized technical appendix is available. Linear technical-appendix equations were cross-checked against US_ACELswm_rep.mod only and require source-level verification.
